name: copilot-money-mcp
description: Query and manage your personal finances with AI using local Copilot Money data. 35 tools for transactions, investments, budgets, goals, and more.

tools.name: get_transactions
tools.description: Get transactions with optional filters for date ranges, category, merchant, account, amount, pending status, and region/country

tools.name: get_cache_info
tools.description: Get information about the local data cache, including the date range of cached transactions and total count

tools.name: refresh_database
tools.description: Refresh the in-memory cache by reloading data from the local Copilot Money database. Use when the user has recently synced new transactions.

tools.name: get_accounts
tools.description: Get all accounts with balances, optionally filter by account type (checking, savings, credit, investment)

tools.name: get_connection_status
tools.description: Get connection status for all linked financial institutions, including last sync timestamps for transactions and investments, login requirements, and error states

tools.name: get_categories
tools.description: Get all categories found in transactions with human-readable names, transaction counts, and total amounts

tools.name: get_recurring_transactions
tools.description: Identify recurring/subscription charges with frequency, monthly cost, confidence score, and next expected charge date. Filter by name or recurring_id for detailed view with transaction history and account info.

tools.name: get_budgets
tools.description: Get budgets from Copilot's native budget tracking.

tools.name: get_goals
tools.description: Get financial goals from Copilot's native goal tracking.

tools.name: get_investment_prices
tools.description: Get investment price history for portfolio tracking. Returns daily and high-frequency price data for stocks, ETFs, mutual funds, and crypto.

tools.name: get_investment_splits
tools.description: Get stock split history. Returns split ratios, dates, and multipliers for accurate historical price and share calculations.

tools.name: get_holdings
tools.description: Get current investment holdings with position-level detail including ticker, quantity, price, average cost, and total return per holding.

tools.name: get_balance_history
tools.description: Get daily balance snapshots for accounts over time. Requires granularity (daily, weekly, or monthly) to control response size.

tools.name: get_investment_performance
tools.description: Get per-security investment performance data, enriched with ticker symbol and name from the securities collection.

tools.name: get_twr_returns
tools.description: Get time-weighted return (TWR) monthly data for investment holdings. Filter by ticker symbol, security ID, or month range.

tools.name: get_securities
tools.description: Get security master data — stocks, ETFs, mutual funds, and cash equivalents. Filter by ticker symbol or security type.

tools.name: get_goal_history
tools.description: Get monthly progress snapshots for financial goals. Filter by goal_id or month range.

tools.name: update_transaction
tools.description: Update one or more fields on a transaction in a single atomic write.

tools.name: review_transactions
tools.description: Mark one or more transactions as reviewed (or unreviewed).

tools.name: create_tag
tools.description: Create a new user-defined tag for categorizing transactions.

tools.name: delete_tag
tools.description: Delete a user-defined tag.

tools.name: create_category
tools.description: Create a new custom category in Copilot Money.

tools.name: update_category
tools.description: Update an existing user-defined category.

tools.name: delete_category
tools.description: Delete a user-defined category.

tools.name: create_budget
tools.description: Create a new budget for a spending category.

tools.name: update_budget
tools.description: Update an existing budget.

tools.name: delete_budget
tools.description: Delete a budget.

tools.name: set_recurring_state
tools.description: Change the state of a recurring item (active, paused, archived).

tools.name: delete_recurring
tools.description: Delete a recurring item.

tools.name: update_goal
tools.description: Update a financial goal's properties.

tools.name: delete_goal
tools.description: Delete a financial goal.

tools.name: update_tag
tools.description: Update an existing tag's name or color.

tools.name: create_recurring
tools.description: Create a new recurring/subscription item.

tools.name: create_goal
tools.description: Create a new financial goal.

tools.name: update_recurring
tools.description: Update a recurring/subscription item — name, amount, frequency, match string, and transaction IDs.
